eth_treasury.hook: The BTC treasury playbook is proven. The next evolution is earning yield while holding — that's where ETH treasuries come in.
eth_treasury.body: 3-4% staking APR changes the math for CFOs. 19 public companies now hold ETH ($13B+). The treasury strategy is evolving from passive holding to productive assets. Staking yield is the unlock.
eth_treasury.cta: What do you think — will ETH treasuries follow the BTC playbook?

eth_treasury.hook: Saylor had to sell $216M BTC to fund operations.
eth_treasury.body: ETH treasuries won't have to. 3% yield on $100M = $3M annual income. Fund operations WITHOUT selling core holdings. The next generation of treasury strategy is productive assets.
eth_treasury.cta: The CFO math changes completely when yield enters the equation.

eth_treasury.hook: MicroStrategy holds $50B+ in BTC. But they can't earn yield on it.
eth_treasury.body: ETH treasuries offer the same store of value + 3-4% staking returns. That's $2M per year on $50M holdings. Passive income without selling your stack.

hims_healthcare.hook: The drug gets the headlines. The infrastructure play is HIMS.
hims_healthcare.body: Telehealth rails for GLP-1 delivery. $725M revenue already, Novo Nordisk deal locked. HIMS isn't just telehealth — it's the distribution infrastructure for the obesity revolution.
hims_healthcare.cta: Healthcare infrastructure or just another pharma play?

hims_healthcare.hook: GLP-1s are disrupting healthcare. HIMS owns the rails.
hims_healthcare.body: The Novo Nordisk deal (March 2026) changed everything. HIMS pivoted from compounded drugs to FDA-approved: Ozempic, Wegovy, Zepbound, Mounjaro. That's infrastructure being built for the long haul.
hims_healthcare.cta: The real play is bigger than the drug.

hims_healthcare.body: The numbers tell the story. HIMS isn't a weight loss company. It's healthcare infrastructure for the GLP-1 revolution. $83/month revenue per subscriber, up from $65. Growing ARPU, growing market.

ai_agentic_commerce.hook: McKinsey says $3-5T in agentic commerce by 2030.
ai_agentic_commerce.body: The winners won't be LLM makers — they'll be the intelligence companies that own customer relationships. Agents need data to be useful. Incumbents with existing relationships (banks, retailers, SaaS) have the moat here.
ai_agentic_commerce.cta: Which companies are positioning for the agentic economy?

ai_agentic_commerce.hook: We're entering the agentic economy faster than most realize.
ai_agentic_commerce.body: By 2027, agent-mediated transactions will be normalized. By 2030, table stakes. Portfolio positioning: NBIS, PLTR, ZETA — the infrastructure plays for agentic commerce.

ai_agentic_commerce.hook: Agents will handle 30% of e-commerce transactions by 2028.
ai_agentic_commerce.body: Not just chatbots. Autonomous agents that research, compare, negotiate, and purchase on your behalf. The customer relationship layer is where value accumulates.
ai_agentic_commerce.cta: The next platform shift is agentic.
